tips.title: Frame Rate Over Graphics
tips.content: Always set your graphics to 'Smooth' and select the highest available Frame Rate ('Extreme' or '90/120 FPS'). Smoother frame rates decrease input lag and give you a massive combat advantage.

tips.title: Master the Jiggle Move
tips.content: In close-range engagements, move your joystick rapidly left and right (jiggling) while firing. This makes you a much harder target to hit while keeping your crosshair locked onto the enemy.

tips.title: Enable Gyroscope (Always On)
tips.content: Switch Gyroscope to 'Always On'. Tilt your phone to micro-adjust your aim and control recoil instead of relying solely on your thumb. It takes practice but elevates your game to pro levels.

tips.title: Pre-fire and Sound Cues
tips.content: Use stereo headphones. When you hear an enemy rushing around a corner, start firing a split-second before you see them. This compensates for network latency and catches them off-guard.

tips.title: Enable Background Restrictions
tips.content: Go to mobile settings and disable background data usage and battery optimization for other social apps. This prevents background synchronization from causing random ping spikes and micro-stutters.

tips.title: Customize Pick-up Limits
tips.content: Set automatic pickup limits for ammo and utility. Auto-picking 300 rounds of 5.56 will clog your backpack, leaving no room for essential smoke grenades and first-aid kits.
